message:
cleanup(ftui-widgets): remove stale #[allow(unused_imports)] in virtualized.rs

These 6 imports were originally annotated as unused/planned, but they are now
actively used by VirtualizedList and its StatefulWidget impl. Remove the stale
allow annotations and the misleading comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
